title: Notice of traffic diversion on Louis Fourie Road
description: BUSINESS NEWS - The switch over of traffic...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - The switch over of traffic on Louis Fourie Road to the new seaside carriageway from the southern limit of construction (at The Lofts) to Beach East Road (at Vredebest) is postponed until the 3rd week of April due to recent inclement weather","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - The switch over of traffic on Louis Fourie Road to the new seaside carriageway from the southern limit of construction (at The Lofts) to Beach East Road (at Vredebest) is postponed until the 3rd week of April due to recent inclement weather"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Please drive carefully during this period of construction.","html":"Please drive carefully during this period of construction."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe, FOR YOU.","html":"Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe, FOR YOU."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
